english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
english translation text: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
O Giver of security! O Allah!

O Rich and Powerful!
O Allah!

O Chief of the chiefs!
O Allah!

O Creator out of nothing!
O Allah!
O He Who brings back all things! O Allah!
O He Who makes visible! O Allah!

O Owner of bounties!
O Allah!

O Allah! O Most High!
O Allah!
O Owner of ascendancy! O Allah!
O He Who remains for ever! O Allah!
O Owner of majesty! O Allah!
O Owner of glory! O Allah!

arabic text: اَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: I beseech You to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
favour on me with Your pleasure,
grant me amnesty through Your munificence,

arabic text: وَتُوَسِّعَ عَلَيَّ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ ٱلْحَلاَلِ ٱلطَّيِّبِ
english translation text: and expand Your lawful, good sustenance to me

arabic text: وَمِنْ حَيْثُ اَحْتَسِبُ وَمِنْ حَيْثُ لاَ اَحْتَسِبُ
english translation text: from whence I expect and from whence I do not,

arabic text: فَإِنِّي عَبْدُكَ لَيْسَ لِي اَحَدٌ سِوَاكَ
english translation text: for I am Your servant, I have no one else other than You,
and there is no one to whom I turn to other than You!
O Most Merciful of the Merciful!
Only that which Allah wills takes place.

arabic text: لاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظيمِ
english translation text: There is no power except in Allah, the High, the Great.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
